title: Itertools, Infinite Streams, and Bounded Pipelines · Transformation Lens: Stream Windowing
summary: Create schedule combinations and rolling windows without materializing an unbounded search space. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp stream windowing increment in a lazy scheduling and windowing toolkit. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Implement pairwise, batched, accumulated, and sliding-window transformations with edge cases.
Estimate product, permutation, and combination growth before enumeration.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
